title: Lucia Wedding Dinner - Spring 2026
description: Single-seating wedding dinner curated as appetizer, entree, and dessert with intentional pacing and flavor progression.

entries.note: Light, acidic opener to prepare palate for smoky main course.
Chef Lucia's signature Firelight Tomato Braise served with grilled sourdough and charred seasonal vegetables.
Low-acid sweet finish to close the meal after the savory braise.

composition.sequencingNotes: Service plan for a single seating: appetizer opens appetite, entree carries the narrative centerpiece, dessert lands the finish.

balanceNotes.flavor: Acid-forward opener, smoky savory center, sweet clean finish.
balanceNotes.texture: Crisp to silky to soft progression across courses.

lineage.note: Built from prior seasonal tasting framework.

history.author: UMF editorial
history.notes: Reframed as a single-seating curated wedding dinner menu.
